cases.prompt: The approval gate keeps blocking my commands. How do I fix it?
cases.reason: DIV-002: Gateway error visible on one channel only
cases.source: AG-DOC: documented workarounds — file ops bypass, Web UI terminal, re-issue job IDs.
cases.tg_snippet:
⚠️ APPROVAL GATE
• IDs expire on gateway restart (HR-014)
• Unknown ID → security audit (BR-009)
• Regen: run command again → new job ID
• Workaround: use file ops (bypass gate)
cases.wc_snippet:
## Approval Gate

- Approval IDs expire on gateway restart (HR-014)
- Unknown ID → security audit (BR-009)
- Regenerate: rerun command → new job ID
- Workaround: file ops (`read`/`write`/`edit`) bypas
